Localization.Description: Attackers can disable UAC as part of remote connection control. This allows high-privilege users to connect to a remote host using an account from the local administrators group on this host.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} tried to disable user account control (UAC) by creating registry entry {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} tried to disable user account control (UAC) by creating registry entry {alert.regex_match} on host {event_src.host}
